text: BREAKING: Scientists confirm new vaccine reduces hospitalisation by 90 percent. Trust the WHO and BBC reports.
I'm worried about the hospitals hiding the real numbers. The death toll is being suppressed by mainstream media.
BBC reported that the WHO updated guidance on long COVID care this week. Important official update.
Why is everyone trusting the New York Times these days? They got the last three stories wrong.
Reuters confirms inflation slowed last quarter. Good news for households finally.
AP News says the climate summit ended without a binding agreement. Major disappointment for activists.
Scientists are pushing back on claims that vaccines cause autism. Multiple peer-reviewed studies disprove it.
I keep hearing about hidden side effects of the new drug. Why isn't BBC covering this?
